defects.summary: The warned-choice acknowledgement checkbox measured as a 22px high labelled hit area in the browser target-size pass.

remediations.summary: Gave the shared pharmacy inline acknowledgement checkbox row a 44px minimum hit area and centered the native checkbox within that target.

boundedExternalBoundaries.summary: The suite uses Playwright DOM, keyboard, aria snapshot, and status-message assertions. It does not claim to replace manual assistive-technology assessment or inclusive user testing.

The suite captures deterministic Chromium baselines and runs Firefox smoke for critical states. It does not claim full physical device-lab approval across every browser, OS, and pharmacy network configuration.
